company.heading: Name your company
company.subheading: This is the organization your agents will work for.
company.missionPlaceholder: What is this company trying to achieve?

agent.heading: Create your first agent
agent.subheading: Choose how this agent will run tasks.
agent.envCheckDescription: Runs a live probe that asks the adapter CLI to respond with hello.
agent.anthropicKeyWarningMiddle: is set. You can clear it in this CEO adapter config and retry the probe.

task.heading: Give it something to do
task.subheading: Give your agent a small task to start with — a bug fix, a research question, writing a script.
task.descriptionPlaceholder: Add more detail about what the agent should do...
task.defaultTitle: Hire your first engineer and create a hiring plan
task.defaultDescription:
You are the CEO. You set the direction for the company.

- hire a founding engineer
- write a hiring plan
- break the roadmap into concrete tasks and start delegating work

launch.heading: Ready to launch
launch.subheading: Everything is set up. Launching now will create the starter task, wake the agent, and open the issue.

errors.opencodeRequiresModel: OpenCode requires an explicit model in provider/model format.
errors.opencodeModelsLoading: OpenCode models are still loading. Please wait and try again.
errors.noOpencodeModels: No OpenCode models discovered. Run `opencode models` and authenticate providers.
errors.selectCompanyFirst: Create or select a company before testing adapter environment.
errors.retryUnsetStillFailing: Retried with ANTHROPIC_API_KEY unset in adapter config, but the environment test is still failing.
errors.unsetAnthropicFailed: Failed to unset ANTHROPIC_API_KEY and retry.
